title: iris × barthiiformis
intro: Iris × barthiiformis is a hybrid iris plant, resulting from the cross between Iris barbata and Iris germanica. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Iris × barthiiformis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce swelling and pain, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the roots or rhizomes, which can then be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
